EmailTemplate.name: Notify TL Regarding Demand Ageing
EmailTemplate.subject: Demand - {!RW_Demand__c.Name} Ageing Alert
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello Team Lead,
The following Demand record has crossed its ageing threshold:
Demand: {!Demand__c.Name} Demand Due Ageing: {!RW_Demand__c.RW_Demand_Aging__c} days PTP Ageing: {!Demand__c.PTP_Ageing__c} days
Please follow up accordingly.
